query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `consultantPortfolio` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `consultantId` int NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `imageUrl` varchar(500),
  `projectType` varchar(100),
  `location` varchar(255),
  `year` varchar(10),
  `area` varchar(100),
  `sortOrder` int DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `consultantPortfolio_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `consultantPortfolio_consultantId_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`consultantId`) REFERENCES `consultants`(`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

);
